title: Smart step-aside: Y-axis ±1 and perpendicular-to-build-direction offset selection
description: The adapter's step-aside currently hardcodes x+2. When the bot stands on the target block, it should: (1) prefer offsets perpendicular to the direction of the next block (typically Z-axis when building along X), (2) try y±1 levels for better placement access, (3) check walkable ground below each candidate position, (4) try 4 cardinal directions in priority order {z+2, z-2, x-2, x+2}, falling back to x+2 as last resort.
